implementation_summary.summary: CP00-719 extends the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P09 secondary workflow and permission/audit binding descriptor over 40 planned units from RP23.P09.M04.S01 through RP23.P09.M05.S20 while preserving CP00-694 through CP00-718 as historical foundation evidence and keeping bank, card, WEHAGO, Douzone, tax export, DART, financial payload, credential, permission decision, audit body, Hermes runtime, and product-state surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-719 finance integrations P09 workflow permission audit binding pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-719 RP23.P09.M04.S01-RP23.P09.M05.S20 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
